mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id, residence_id, `year_month`, area, unit_price, days, month_days, amount, status, confirmed_at, confirmed_by, created_at FROM rent_records WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rent_records WHERE `year_month` = #{yearMonth} AND status = 'confirmed' AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM rent_records WHERE `year_month` = #{yearMonth} AND status = 'confirmed' AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rent_records (employee_id, residence_id, `year_month`, area, unit_price, days, month_days, amount, status, created_at) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{residenceId}, #{yearMonth}, #{area}, #{unitPrice}, #{days}, #{monthDays}, #{amount}, 'draft', NOW())

INSERT INTO rent_records (employee_id, residence_id, `year_month`, area, unit_price, days, month_days, amount, status, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.employeeId}, #{item.residenceId}, #{item.yearMonth}, #{item.area}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.days}, #{item.monthDays}, #{item.amount}, 'draft', NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE rent_records SET status = 'confirmed', confirmed_at = NOW() WHERE `year_month` = #{yearMonth} AND status = 'draft' AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE rent_records SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE `year_month` = #{yearMonth} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT rr.id, rr.employee_id, rr.residence_id, rr.`year_month`, rr.area, rr.unit_price, rr.days, rr.month_days, rr.amount, rr.status, rr.confirmed_at, rr.created_at FROM rent_records rr INNER JOIN employees e ON e.id = rr.employee_id WHERE rr.is_deleted = 0
AND rr.`year_month` = #{yearMonth}
AND (e.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR e.employee_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY rr.`year_month` DESC, e.employee_no
